records.ety: [It. arcipelago, properly, chief sea; Gr. pref <?/ + <?/ sea, perh. akin to <?/ blow, and expressing the beating of the waves. See Plague.]

defs: The Grecian Archipelago, or Ægean Sea, separating Greece from Asia Minor. It is studded with a vast number of small islands.
Hence: Any sea or broad sheet of water interspersed with many islands or with a group of islands.
